description: Product Description This dolls high chair has sturdy metal legs and fabric seat. Folds flat for storage. Unfolded size length 32cm x width 22cm x height 52cm. This product conforms to EN71 and the toy safety Directive. PLEASE remove all packaging before giving it to your child. This toy is suitable for age 3 years and upwards.
